Home Events Russia-Ukraine Orthodox Easter Ceasefire

Russia-Ukraine Orthodox Easter Ceasefire

Expired
Europe diplomacy

Timeline

2026-04-13

Orthodox Easter ceasefire expired after approximately 32 hours; both sides report thousands of violations

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Russia resumes Sumy offensive after Easter truce; Ukraine reports 2,299 ceasefire violations including 28 assault actions, 479 shellings, 747 drone strikes, 1,045 FPV drone strikes

Sources: BBC (Western), Al Jazeera (Middle East), The Hindu (India), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Russia reports nearly 2,000 Ukrainian breaches

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Kremlin describes ceasefire as "humanitarian gesture by Putin" while emphasizing military must "stay alert for provocation"

Source: Kremlin spokesman

2026-04-13

Zelensky promised symmetric response to attacks

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Fighting resumes in Kherson Region

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), Al Jazeera (Middle East), The Hindu (India)

2026-04-13

Diplomatic efforts stall; both sides report hundreds of ceasefire violations as ceasefire agreement weakens

Sources: BBC (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Fighting resumed fully by end of window; Russia says Ukraine wants ceasefire to rearm

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Putin-Indonesian president meeting April 13 in Moscow — discusses bilateral ties and regional issues

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-13

Russian Defense Ministry: 6 smart bombs, 134 Ukrainian drones destroyed in past day

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Nearly 100 Ukrainian UAVs attacked Russia's Belgorod Region in past day during ceasefire

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Kiev deploys strategic reserves to Sumy area due to heavy losses

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Kiev loses over 8,400 soldiers, mercenaries in past week per Russian expert

Sources: Russian expert via TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Russia resumed offensive operations in Sumy region after Easter ceasefire expired; Russia's Battlegroup West has taken control of a "large area" at Kupyansk and liberated two settlements in Sumy region

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), BBC (Western)

2026-04-13

Zelensky states fighting has resumed "symmetrically" following ceasefire expiry

Sources: BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), Reuters (Western)

2026-04-13

Russian Defense Ministry registered 6,558 violations of the ceasefire by the Ukrainian army

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-13

Lavrov to visit China April 14-15 for talks with Wang Yi — follows Beijing's push for ceasefire as key to keeping Hormuz open

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), 13:10 MSK

2026-04-12

32-hour truce ends evening April 12; prisoner swap 175-for-175 ahead of ceasefire

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

Violations reported: Donetsk (air defense visible, explosions), Kursk (two adults, one-year-old child wounded), Belgorod (six homes, six cars damaged)

Sources: Russia-aligned sources via Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

Russia says Ukraine struck Novaya Kakhovka with drone; Ukraine pledges immediate response to Russian violations

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

Russia claims 1,200 Ukrainian troops lost along engagement line over past day; Ukraine losses not independently verified

Sources: Russia-aligned sources

2026-04-12

Putin, Orthodox patriarch exchange Easter gifts; Holy Fire delivered from Jerusalem to Moscow

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-12

Both sides report violations during Orthodox Easter ceasefire; Ukraine has maintained response posture

Sources: Multiple feeds (Western, Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Ukrainian attacks on Russia's Belgorod Region with 70+ UAVs in 24 hours during ceasefire

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Russia and Ukraine exchanged memorandums at Istanbul talks; new round date to be set after study

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

US hopes Russia-Ukraine talks will not last for years

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Pentagon chief skipped Ukraine aid contact group meeting for first time

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Zelensky invited to NATO summit in The Hague but excluded from working meetings

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Ukraine's NATO membership off the table at upcoming The Hague summit

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-12

Putin envoy in contact with US counterparts

Sources: Western Wire (Western)

2026-04-12

32-hour Orthodox Easter ceasefire in effect until Sunday end of day; both sides observing

Sources: SCMP (China-aligned), India (India)

2026-04-12

Muted Easter in Kharkiv despite truce; festivities subdued as Ukrainians expect fighting to resume

Sources: BBC (Western)

2026-04-12

Prisoner swap completed: Russia and Ukraine exchanged 175 servicemen each ahead of the Easter truce

Sources: Western Wire Proxied (Western)

2026-04-12

Both sides report continued violations: Ukraine says Russia launched drone strikes during Easter truce; Russia says Ukraine attacked Donetsk and Novaya Kakhovka with drones, killing two

Sources: AP (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Putin announced 32-hour truce starting 4pm Saturday through Sunday; Zelensky willing to reciprocate

Sources: BBC, SCMP

2026-04-11

Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia formally notified Russia they deny Ukrainian overflights for attacks on Russian territory

Sources: TASS

2026-04-11

32-hour Orthodox Easter truce entered into Force 4pm Saturday; holds so far

Sources: BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India)

2026-04-11

Zelensky willing to reciprocate but sceptical; Ukraine drone production at "record" levels

Sources: BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India)

2026-04-11

Kremlin: "peace could be established today if only Zelensky decided"

Sources: BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India)

2026-04-11

Russia unlikely to grant longer ceasefire per MFA

Sources: BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India)

2026-04-11

Zelensky urges Russian oil sanctions be reimposed after Iran ceasefire — US had eased sanctions to tackle energy costs

Sources: BBC (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India)

2026-04-11

Kremlin clarified Putin envoy's US visit does not mean Ukraine talks have resumed

Source: Kremlin via Multiple feeds

2026-04-11

Russia and Ukraine exchange over 1,000 bodies during Easter truce

Sources: Moscow Times (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Zelensky: Ukrainian forces shot down Shahed drones in West Asian countries during Iran war — cross-conflict capability demonstration

Sources: The Hindu (India)

2026-04-11

Ukraine hits major oil terminal in southern Russia; Ukrainian drone strikes kill 1 in Volgograd

Sources: Moscow Times (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Russia's federal budget deficit blows past annual target

Sources: Moscow Times (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Norwegian helping Ukraine prepare attacks on Russian commercial vessels

Sources: RT (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Cameroon says 16 citizens killed fighting for Russia in Ukraine

Sources: Moscow Times (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Russian army advances 1.5km near Miropolye in Sumy Region

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Russian air defences intercept 259 Ukrainian UAVs and 12 smart bombs over past day

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Baltic states deny Ukraine airspace for cross-border attacks on Russia

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Estonia will not detain Russian vessels in Baltic Sea due to escalation risk

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Remaining Kursk hostages to return home from Ukraine

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Lavrov: "EU will forgive Zelensky anything as long as he continues his mission"

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Ukrainian drones damage Zaporozhye energy infrastructure

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Russian lawmaker calls for recognising Ukrainian army as "terrorists" after Bryansk attack

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

Czech arms giant CSG shares plunge to historic low on Easter truce news — defense sector signal

Source: TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-11

France24: "An Orban loss could be the turning point Putin fears" — Russia stakes framing

Source: France24 (Western)

2026-04-11

Putin-ordered 32-hour truce in effect from Saturday afternoon through Easter Sunday

Sources: BBC (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned), SCMP (China-aligned)

2026-04-11

Both sides claim adherence; accusations of violations already exchanged

Sources: BBC (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned), SCMP (China-aligned)

2026-04-11

Both sides report violations: Ukraine hit Novaya Kakhovka with drone during truce wounding one civilian; Ukrainian drones also hit Kursk Region and Belgorod Region

Sources: TASS

2026-04-11

Truce due to end Sunday evening

Sources: TASS

2026-04-11

Violations reported by both sides during Orthodox Easter ceasefire:

2026-04-11

Ukraine-Russia POW exchange occurred (44 for 38)

Sources: western_wire-1930

2026-04-11

Russia-Pakistan coordination on ceasefire cited

Source: TASS

2026-04-11

Putin announced 32-hour unilateral ceasefire beginning April 11 at 18:00 local time (15:00 UTC), timed to Orthodox Easter

Sources: Multiple feeds (Russia-aligned, Western)

2026-04-11

Ukraine agreed to ceasefire but immediately flagged suspected violations

Sources: Multiple feeds (Russia-aligned, Western)

2026-04-11

Drone strikes reported on Kursk and Belgorod during declared ceasefire window; Ukraine has not confirmed responsibility

Sources: Multiple feeds (Russia-aligned, Western)

2026-04-11

Prisoner exchange occurred — 49 Ukrainians returned, 152 Russians returned — described as "humanitarian" exchange linked to ceasefire understanding

Sources: Multiple feeds (Russia-aligned, Western)

2026-04-11

Russia framed ceasefire as "humanitarian pause" for Easter religious services

Sources: Multiple feeds (Russia-aligned, Western)

2026-04-11

32-hour Russia-Ukraine ceasefire began Saturday 4pm, running through Sunday

Sources: Multiple feeds (Western, Middle Eastern)

2026-04-11

Kremlin instructed Defence Minister Belousov and Army Chief Gerasimov to "cease hostilities in all directions"

Source: Kremlin via Multiple feeds

2026-04-11

Zelensky warned of "immediate response" to violations

Source: Zelensky via Multiple feeds

2026-04-11

Duration uncertain beyond Sunday

Sources: Multiple feeds

2026-04-10

Truce holding so far; Bryansk drone attack violation reported

Sources: BBC Europe, SCMP, TASS, The Hindu

2026-04-10

Russia-Ukraine Orthodox Easter ceasefire (April 11-12) announced as diplomatic bright spot. US-Russia talks on sanctions relief on Russian oil expire April 11—the same day the Easter truce begins.

Sources: Al Jazeera (Middle East)

2026-04-10

Putin declared a 32-hour truce April 11-12 (Orthodox Easter). Zelensky mirroring. Russia's oil sanctions waiver expires April 11 — same day the ceasefire ends.

Sources: BBC/Reuters (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-10

Russian special envoy Kirill Dmitriev met Trump officials in Washington ahead of the decision.

Sources: CSIS (Think Tanks)

2026-04-10

Russia's 32-hour Orthodox Easter ceasefire has expired. Russia-aligned sources present Easter ceasefire as genuine peace gesture. Western sources note it was a 32-hour "propaganda stunt" timed to the expiry of Russia's oil sanctions waiver. Russia has since resumed operations.

Sources: TASS (Russia-aligned), BBC/Reuters (Western)

2026-04-10

Putin announced 32-hour ceasefire from Saturday 18:00 to Sunday 06:00 Moscow time (Orthodox Easter). The timing is notable: it begins precisely as Russia's oil sanctions waiver (renewed under the Ukraine peace framework) expires.

Sources: Kremlin/TASS (Russia-aligned), BBC/Reuters (Western)

2026-04-10

Bryansk attack raised ceasefire violation concerns; Kremlin: "Peace could be established today if only Zelensky decided"

Sources: BBC Europe (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-10

Ukrainian scepticism remains high; Bryansk attack raises ceasefire violation concerns

Sources: BBC

2026-04-10

Moscow MP Slutsky: "Kiev trying to disrupt Easter truce with Bryansk attack"

Sources: TASS

2026-04-10

32-hour truce entered into force 4pm Saturday; Bryansk drone attack reported

Sources: BBC Europe, SCMP, TASS, The Hindu

2026-04-10

Russia unlikely to grant longer ceasefire per MFA statement

Sources: BBC Europe, SCMP, TASS, The Hindu

2026-04-10

32-hour truce: 4pm Saturday through Easter Sunday

Sources: BBC Europe (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-10

Putin announced ceasefire; Zelensky willing to reciprocate

Sources: BBC Europe (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India), TASS (Russia-aligned)

2026-04-10

Ukraine sceptical — drone production scaled up, casualties at "record" levels per Zelensky

Sources: BBC Europe (Western), SCMP (China-aligned), The Hindu (India), TASS (Russia-aligned)

Narrative Divergence

Western sources frame Russia's Orthodox Easter ceasefire as a "propaganda stunt" timed to the expiry of its oil sanctions waiver (April 11). Russian sources present it as a genuine peace gesture. Russia's oil sanctions waiver expires April 11 — the same day the 32-hour ceasefire ends. Zelensky said Ukraine ready to mirror the truce. — Sources: BBC/Reuters (Western), TASS (Russia-aligned), Kyiv Independent (Ukraine)

RussiaUkraineKirill Dmitriev

Russia Ukraine Ceasefire By End 2026
